<!-- Keep the title in Conventional Commits style, e.g. "feat: add foo" -->

## What

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## How

Notes on the approach, trade-offs, or anything reviewers should look at.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `mise run fmt`, `mise run lint`, and `mise run test` pass
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or flags changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
